description_for_model: Codex Cryptica is a local-first, privacy-centric campaign manager for RPG world-building. It allows users to manage entities (Characters, Locations, Factions), build knowledge graphs (connections), and track timelines. The AI can use this plugin to help users brainstorm lore, cross-reference campaign facts, and visualize relationships on a spatial canvas. All data is stored in the user's local vault (OPFS/IndexedDB).
description_for_human: Secure your lore with a local-first vault for your RPG campaigns.
